name: Mulligans Golf Company
about: Mulligans Golf Company is an indoor golf venue offering a fun, flexible, and modern way to enjoy the game of golf regardless of weather, season, or skill level. The facility features indoor golf bays that combine cutting-edge technology with a relaxed, social environment, catering to both first-timers and seasoned players. Pricing is structured for flexibility, with standard hourly rates designed for solo sessions or small groups, and a monthly membership option for frequent players.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to all games and courses with detailed shot data
Relaxed, flexible setting free from pressure
Premium experience without the exclusivity of a country club
Membership option with discounts on leagues and events

food_and_drink.notes: On-site kitchen available for food service.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor providing detailed shot data.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are required to bring their own clubs for use in the simulator bays.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not permitted. Mulligans offers a full bar and an on-site kitchen for food and beverage service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time to play 18 holes depends on the group size and pace, but typically ranges from 1 to 2 hours per bay.

faq.question: Is Mulligans kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Mulligans is designed to be welcoming to all ages and skill levels, making it suitable for families and children.
